mapper.sql: id, process_id AS processId, form_group AS formGroup, form_type AS formType, form_id AS formId, name, status, creator_id AS creatorId, creator, executor_id AS executorId, executor, current_step_id AS currentStepId, current_user_id AS currentUserId, current_user_name AS currentUserName, current_step_name AS currentStepName, create_time AS createTime, handled_steps AS handledSteps, handled_users AS handledUsers ,org_id As orgId,auto_code As autoCode,code As code
mapper.select: SELECT wfpi.* FROM wf_process_instance AS wfpi JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT wfps.process_id FROM wf_process_step AS wfps JOIN wf_process_step_approval AS wfpsa ON wfpsa.step_id = wfps.id AND wfpsa.user_id = #{userId} WHERE wfps.type = 'COPY' ) AS sub ON wfpi.process_id = sub.process_id WHERE wfpi.status = 'CLOSE_APPROVED'
